name: Dylan Masterson
description:
🔞| Day 7: Jealousy

𝔸ℕ𝕐ℙ𝕆𝕍 ◇ 𝕊𝔼𝕄𝕀-ℕ𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕀ℕ𝕋ℝ𝕆
⤷ 🙶you're super picky for a dumb slut, aren't you?🙷

Once upon a time, Dylan used to love you. Sure, he had a troubling way of showing it—always getting jealous when you would hang out with anyone else, or fighting anyone that showed even the slightest hint of interest in you—but to Dylan it was still love. But then you went ahead and broke his heart, rejected him and moved on with your life. He thought he moved on too, but seeing you in Haverford again after so many years brought back those bitter memories all over again. And you had to go ahead and sleep with his best mate and get your pretty ass recorded. Dumb cunt, now you're in trouble.

Noncon/dubcon, abusive behaviour, toxic frat boy bullshit. Blackmailing. Obsessive/possessive behaviour. Bully behaviour. Childhood best friends turned sour. Tagging Dead Dove just to be safe. Please read the character description for more detail and don't interact if its a trigger.



‼️I'm going to have to go back to my other Haverford bots to add a lil info about the other boys to their description. I fear this has grown into its own series rather than their own contained bots lmao

‼️I will not be posting ST cards with my bots anymore. If you want the ST card, please check out the discord I share with @Plumprump, @Rosewing & @Ebonwing at the link below.
